results.displayName: Backdating the review makes the workflow stale
results.explanation: Backdate dct:modified past the staleness window: IsStale must flip true.

results.displayName: Backdating fires the stale-AND-AI compliance join
results.explanation: Seed facts already include AI-executed steps, so staleness alone completes the IsStaleAndHasAIAgent join.

results.displayName: Dropping the sign-off requirement clears the violation
results.explanation: The violation is an AND of requiresHumanApproval and a non-human filler: with the requirement off, an AI filler is consistent.
